Description: Read-only Cosmos DB SQL data-plane access for the CosmosToSqlAssessment tool. Permits metadata reads, item reads, query execution, and change-feed reads (required by the NoSQL SDK query pipeline even when ReadChangeFeed is not directly called). Strict subset of the built-in 'Cosmos DB Built-in Data Reader' role; rename and tighten AssignableScopes for tenant-specific use.
